task_name: Add Builder Task Candidate Fixture Coverage Map
goal: Add a Builder Task Candidate fixture coverage map and a local consistency test so documented MVP cases stay aligned with golden fixtures.
claims: BP-051 documents current Builder Task Candidate fixture coverage.
BP-051 adds a coverage-map consistency test to catch fixture/doc drift.
BP-051 does not change Builder Task Candidate runtime behavior or fixtures.
assumptions: BP-049 introduced the first Builder Task Candidate golden fixtures.
BP-050 made the shared review suite cover the candidate mock.
Coverage visibility should be added before defining Human Gate handoff.
dod: docs/BUILDER_TASK_CANDIDATE_FIXTURE_COVERAGE_v0.md exists and lists the current fixture cases.
tools/test-bluepilot-review-suite.cjs runs the Builder Task Candidate coverage-map test.
stop_conditions: Builder Task Candidate runtime or fixture changes become necessary
Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, task create, execute, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-050 added Builder Task Candidate review-suite checks but did not document fixture coverage or guard doc/fixture drift.
